repeated_runs.note: Seed duoc gui xuong app bang benchmark profile va map sang request LLM de giam do ngau nhien giua cac lan chay.

tuning_protocol.note: Moi kien truc duoc tuning rieng tren dev split voi cung ngan sach candidate va cung seed schedule truoc khi khoa profile de test.

human_judgment.fallback: Chua co nhan nguoi cham. Chi chuan bi workflow va bao cao pending cho den khi co annotator that.

controlled.description: Legacy alias cho controlled_with_fusion de giu tuong thich voi cac lenh cu.

budget.budget_note: Evaluator gui profile runtime xuong tung app, nen retrieval budget va output token budget duoc khoa bang request metadata.
